manifest_revision: v45.2 (text-level corrections — same data; conclusion softened, deprecation markers added on superseded artifacts)
fix_summary: Adds in-corpus anchor: M3,N3,O3,F3,P3 re-measured at canonical cell on b21u01 (same host as v45 baseline)
Replaces wall-clock paired timing with focal-stream CUDA events (measures focal P3 latency under contention, not max(focal,interferer))
Reconciles the +23.27 vs +24.11 inconsistency: those numbers came from cross-host wall-clock; v45.1 reports event-timed in-corpus deltas
v45.2 text correction: conclusion softened to acknowledge ladder non-monotonicity (O3<M3<N3<F3<P3 — only ~3 us spread; deltas within p25-p75 IQR)
v45.2 text correction: deprecation markers added on v45_baseline.csv and v45_paired.csv (wall-clock); see superseded_artifacts in v45_manifest.json

reviewer_addresses.Skeptic.paired_timing: Replaced perf_counter() wall-clock with focal-stream cudaEventRecord/elapsed_time pair; interferer launches BEFORE focal but is timed only via the focal stream events. Sample script bench_p3_paired_events.py.
reviewer_addresses.Skeptic.cross_host_anchor: New v45_anchor.csv re-measures the FULL ladder (M3,N3,O3,F3,P3) on the same b21u01 host that produced v45_baseline.csv, so the P3-vs-F3 delta is now a single-host single-version comparison.
reviewer_addresses.Skeptic.non_monotonic_ladder_v45_2: Acknowledged: O3 (release-CAS) at 36.94 us is FASTER than M3 (relaxed) at 37.61 us in the in-corpus event-timed anchor — so the ladder is NOT monotonic in fence strength. The +1-3 us P3 deltas vs F3/N3/O3 lie within the per-primitive p25-p75 IQR (~2-3 us). Headline conclusion is now: 'P3 is statistically indistinguishable from F3/N3/O3 within measurement noise; ordering tax on CDNA3 CAS is at most a few us and not monotonic in fence strength.'
reviewer_addresses.Skeptic.wall_clock_csvs_still_in_corpus_: v45_baseline.csv and v45_paired.csv are now flagged in v45_manifest.json with superseded_artifacts.<filename>.superseded_by and superseded_artifacts.<filename>.do_not_use_for fields. data_quality.py-readable. Files retained for audit; canonical claims must use v45_anchor*.csv and v45_paired_canonical_event*.csv.
reviewer_addresses.UX.headline_consistency: Δ-vs-F3 and Δ-vs-M3 now reported in the same table with explicit labels; no more ambiguity between the two.
reviewer_addresses.UX.manifest_self_describing_v45_2: v45_manifest.json now carries top-level superseded_by:'v45.1', corrected_p3_canonical_us:39.85, and DEPRECATED_ prefix on stale fields, so a reader who only fetches the v45 manifest sees the correction inline.

anchor.monotonicity_check: FAILS — sorted by median: O3(36.94) < M3(37.61) < N3(38.53) < F3(38.57) < P3(39.85). O3 (relaxed-load + release-CAS) is the FASTEST despite carrying a release fence; this contradicts the simple 'more fences = more cost' ladder model.
anchor.noise_band_check: All four neighbors (M3,N3,O3,F3) and P3 lie within a ~3-us window. The largest delta (P3-O3 = 2.91 us) is comparable to the per-primitive IQR (~2-3 us). Pairwise differences are at the edge of statistical resolution at n=700.

ladder_deltas_us._caveat_v45_2: These deltas are real but small (1-3 us) and within the per-primitive p25-p75 IQR (~2-3 us). The ladder is non-monotonic (O3<M3). Treat as 'ordering tax is bounded at a few us and is not a monotonic function of fence strength' rather than a clean monotonic ladder.

paired_canonical_event.timer: focal_stream_cuda_event (interferer launched on stream B but timed only via focal stream A start/end events)

DEPRECATED_artifacts_in_v45.v45_manifest.json: see top-level superseded_by:'v45.1' and DEPRECATED_ prefixes inside that file

softened_conclusion: P3 ATOMIC_CAS_ACQREL on CDNA3 is statistically indistinguishable from F3/N3/O3 within measurement noise (all four neighbors and P3 lie in a ~3-us window; per-primitive IQR is 2-3 us). The ordering tax on CDNA3 CAS is at most a few microseconds and is NOT monotonic in fence strength (O3 release-CAS is faster than M3 relaxed in the in-corpus anchor). The previous v45 claim of a +23 us P3-vs-F3 ordering tax was a measurement artifact (wall-clock timer + cross-host F3 anchor); the corrected single-host event-timed delta is +1.28 us, which is within noise.
